title: Dragon Ball Super’s New Remake Is a Great Idea, Here’s Why
content: Dragon Ball kicked off the year with several exciting announcements during the Genki Dama Matsuri, an event held to commemorate the manga’s 40th anniversary. The franchise is planning a huge return this year with a remake film as part of the Fall 2026 season lineup and will retell the story of Dragon Ball Z: Battle of…
author: ComicBook

title: Kodama Tales Licenses New Grapper Baki Manga
content: Kyodo Printing Co., Ltd. 's Kodama Tales subsidiary announced on Wednesday that it has licensed Keisuke Itagaki 's New Grappler Baki manga , the first sequel to the original 1991 series. The first two volumes will ship in November.
author: ANN

title: 11 Years Later, Acclaimed Shonen Jump Anime Is Finally Coming to Netflix
content: The first month of the Spring 2026 anime season is almost over, and it has brought several surprises in the anime world. Netflix , a major streaming giant, continues to venture into the anime industry with new additions and projects that always pique the interest of anime enthusiasts.
author: ComicBook

title: Demon Slayer Unveils New Look At Beloved Character Ahead of His Big Fight in Infinity Castle
content: Warning: This article contains spoilers from the Demon Slayer manga! 2025 was by far the biggest year for Demon Slayer as the first installment of the Infinity Castle trilogy made history by grossing over 100 billion yen across the globe.
author: ComicBook

title: Kuromaru's Tokyo Salad Bowl Manga Gets Sequel
content: Kodansha 's Comic Days website launched the sequel to Kuromaru 's Tokyo Salad Bowl: Kokusai Sōsa Jikenbo ( Tokyo Salad Bowl : International Investigation Files) manga, titled Tokyo Salad Bowl 2nd dish: Keishichō-hen ( Tokyo Salad Bowl 2nd dish: Metropolitan Police Department Arc), on Monday.
author: ANN

title: Mikase Hayashi's Soredemo Otōto wa Koishitagaru Manga Ends in 2 Chapters
content: The June issue of Hakusensha 's LaLa magazine revealed on Thursday that Mikase Hayashi 's Soredemo Otōto wa Koishitagaru ( Still, my brother wants to fall in love. ) manga will end in two chapters (it is not clear if the count includes the manga's current 37th chapter published in the magazine).
author: ANN

title: Inosuke From Demon Slayer Gets New 2026 Birthday Illustration by Ufotable
content: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba revealed a new birthday illustration by ufotable for Inosuke Hashibira to mark the occasion in 2026. Inosuke celebrated his birthday on April 22. Ufotable often releases seasonal and character-focused artwork to celebrate special occasions, such as Christmas , New Year , or Valentine’s…
author: Anime Corner

title: The Maid I Admire Looks Good with a Cigarette Manga Ends
content: The May issue of Square Enix 's Monthly Gangan Joker magazine published the final chapter of Eke Shimamizu 's The Maid I Admire Looks Good with a Cigarette ( Akogare no Maid-san wa Tobacco ga Niau ) on Wednesday. The fourth and final compiled book volume ships on June 22. Manga UP!
author: ANN

title: Doro no Kuni Manga Ends in Next Chapter on May 19
content: Doro no Kuni Manga Ends in Next Chapter on May 19
author: ANN

title: Boruto: Two Blue Vortex Ends Its Latest Fight With an Unexpected Character Taking the Spotlight
content: Boruto: Two Blue Vortex has released its latest chapter in its monthly schedule, and with it, the series concludes its latest fight. This battle began eight chapters ago, when Mamushi revealed his intention to devour Eida and launched an attack on Konoha.
author: ComicBook
